name: Pitch
description: Collaborative presentation tool with API/webhooks for template automation.

seo.title: Pitch — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Pitch: Collaborative presentation tool with API/webhooks for template automation.

when_to_use: Collaborative investor deck with automated template updates
Sales presentation with webhook-triggered content sync
Team-edited pitch deck with version history and comments
API-driven presentation automation for personalized decks
Design-consistent slide deck with Pitch template library

pros: Real-time collaboration beats Google Slides polish
Clean templates that don't look corporate
API and webhooks automate deck generation
Analytics on who viewed which slide
cons: Free plan gutted after pricing pivot
Export to PPTX loses fidelity on effects
review.verdict: Best-looking collaborative deck tool on the market, but the 2024 pricing shift burned early free users.
review.best_for: Startup teams building investor decks and branded sales presentations together
review.not_for: Solo users who relied on the old generous free tier

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
